patch.value: Document changelog classifier keyword routing for contributors

classifyItem two-tier logic (strong=type+tags, weak=title, BUG_LIKE default, flag-strip) is undocumented; closing items with wrong tags/types silently routes them to Other instead of Fixed/Added/Changed.
RELEASING.md gains a Changelog Classification section: two tiers, keyword->category table, BUG_LIKE default, tag-override examples, and the never-hand-edit rule; docs-skills gate passes.

classifyItem two-tier logic (strong=type+tags, weak=title, BUG_LIKE default, flag-strip) is undocumented; closing items with wrong tags/types silently routes them to Other instead of Fixed/Added/Changed.
